title: Khartoum North Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Khartoum North with a Z-Score of +3.80. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Khartoum North is characterized by extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 12.3 GG. 
 The relative humidity is very low, at 15%, exacerbating the heat stress. 
 The wind speed is moderate, at 12.3 km/h, but it does not provide significant relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
